overview: University College of Engineering, Adikavi Nannaya University (AKNUCOE), established in 2006, is a constituent public university college located within the main campus of Adikavi Nannaya University in Rajamahendravaram (Rajahmundry), Andhra Pradesh. The college was established to serve the technical education needs of the twin Godavari districts, offering a modern Choice Based Credit System (CBCS) curriculum across key engineering disciplines integrated with the university’s centralized placement and research facility network.
accreditation: Approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi, and recognized under the public university framework of Adikavi Nannaya University (UGC recognized and NAAC accredited).

nirfRanking.university: Adikavi Nannaya University is recognized among prominent state-run universities in Andhra Pradesh

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering
B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering

placements.highestSalary: ₹6.50 LPA (Consistent domestic benchmark; student pool feedback reports up to isolated peak highlights)
placements.placementRate: 70% – 85% primarily for CSE, IT, and ECE branches
placements.companiesVisited: 35+ companies through campus drives and state university pooling initiatives

admissions.admissionProcess: Undergraduate B.Tech allocations are strictly executed via Category A convener seats through AP EAPCET counseling administered by APSCHE. PG streams are filled through AP PGECET or ICET counseling mechanisms based on state rank metrics.
admissions.importantDates: The admissions timeline follows the annual APSCHE state-level calendar, running primarily between June and September.

campus.area: Spacious block inside the extensive main university campus ecosystem
campus.specialNote: As a constituent college, engineering students have complete access to the central amenities, sporting facilities, and cultural forums of the main Adikavi Nannaya University campus.

hostelAndScholarships.hostelFee: ₹30,000 – ₹40,000 per year (Highly subsidized university accommodation standard fees)
hostelAndScholarships.messFee: Charged separately based on dynamic monthly structural usage
scholarships: Jagananna Vidya Deevena (JVD) structural full fee reimbursements for eligible AP candidates
State Post-Matric Scholarships for SC, ST, BC, and EBC candidates
National Fellowship provisions for research students

contact.address: University College of Engineering, Adikavi Nannaya University, Rajahmahendravaram - 533296, East Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh, India
